name: wp-content-eslint
description: ESLint configuration for WordPress plugins and themes

scripts.copy:insert-interactive-figure: mkdir -p blocks/insert-interactive-figure/build && cp blocks/insert-interactive-figure/src/block.json blocks/insert-interactive-figure/build/block.json && cp blocks/insert-interactive-figure/src/render.php blocks/insert-interactive-figure/build/render.php && cp blocks/insert-interactive-figure/src/index.css blocks/insert-interactive-figure/build/index.css 2>/dev/null || true && cp blocks/insert-interactive-figure/src/style-index.css blocks/insert-interactive-figure/build/style-index.css 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:insert-interactive-figure: npm run clean:insert-interactive-figure && wp-scripts build blocks/insert-interactive-figure/src/index.js blocks/insert-interactive-figure/src/view.js --output-path=blocks/insert-interactive-figure/build && npm run copy:insert-interactive-figure
scripts.lint:js:report: eslint --ext .js plugins/graphic_data_plugin/ themes/graphic_data_theme/ --format json --output-file eslint-report.json || true
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:php-js
